title: My tenant owes £15,000 in rent, but I can't get them out of the property
summary: UK landlords are expressing concerns that new tenant protection laws could make it significantly harder to evict problematic tenants, citing cases where unpaid rent cannot be recovered. The landlord concerns highlight tensions between tenant rights and property owner protections.
content: Landlords tell BBC News why they fear new laws could make it harder to remove problematic tenants.

zh.title: 我的租户欠了15000英镑的租金，但我无法将他们赶出去
zh.summary: 英国房东们表示，新的租客保护法可能会大幅增加驱逐有问题租户的难度，有案例显示无法收回未付租金。房东的担忧突显了租客权利与房产所有人保护之间的矛盾。

title: Stock futures inch higher after the S&P 500 posts another record, Wall Street awaits earnings: Live updates
summary: The S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite reached new record highs Monday, with stock futures continuing upward momentum. Market participants await upcoming corporate earnings reports that could shape near-term trading directions.
content: The S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite closed at new record highs on Monday.

zh.title: 标普500指数创新高后股指期货小幅上升，华尔街等待财报公布：实时更新
zh.summary: 标普500指数和纳斯达克综合指数周一创下新高，股指期货继续保持上升势头。市场参与者期待即将公布的企业财报，这些财报可能会影响短期交易方向。

title: OpenAI shakes up partnership with Microsoft, capping revenue share payments
summary: OpenAI and Microsoft have modified their partnership agreement, with OpenAI implementing a cap on revenue-share payments to Microsoft. The change reflects evolving dynamics between the companies since OpenAI's structural changes last October.
content: Things have changed since Microsoft and OpenAI announced a broad agreement following OpenAI's restructuring in October.

zh.title: OpenAI调整与微软的合作，对收益分成支付设置上限
zh.summary: OpenAI和微软修改了合作协议，OpenAI对支付给微软的收益分成实施了上限。这一变化反映了自去年10月OpenAI结构调整以来两家公司之间不断演变的动态。

title: Europe’s rearmament push drives global military spending to record $2.9 trillion despite U.S. pullback
summary: Global military spending reached a record $2.89 trillion in 2025, driven primarily by European rearmament efforts in response to geopolitical tensions. The increase marks the 11th consecutive year of growth despite a decline in U.S. defense spending.
content: Global military spending rose for an 11th straight year to a record $2.89 trillion in 2025, driven by Europe’s rearmament push, even as U.S. outlays declined.

zh.title: 欧洲重新武装推动全球军事支出创纪录的2.9万亿美元，尽管美国支出下降
zh.summary: 全球军事支出在2025年达到创纪录的2.89万亿美元，主要由欧洲为应对地缘政治紧张局势而进行的重新武装推动。尽管美国防务支出下降，这标志着连续第11年的增长。

title: 'I had £20,000 stolen and had to fight a 13-month fraud reporting rule to get it back'
summary: A UK fraud victim had to battle a 13-month deadline to report a £20,000 scam to her bank and retrieve funds. The case highlights growing concerns about strict fraud-reporting timelines and is spurring calls for regulatory reform.
content: Sarah has now got her money back but there are calls to reform the deadline for reporting scams to banks.

zh.title: 我被盗取了2万英镑，不得不对抗13个月的欺诈举报规则才能追回资金
zh.summary: 一名英国诈骗受害者不得不与13个月的欺诈举报截止日期作战，向银行举报2万英镑的诈骗并追回资金。该案突显了人们对严格欺诈举报时限的日益担忧，并促使人们呼吁进行监管改革。

title: Why Spotify has no button to filter out AI music
summary: Spotify lacks a feature to filter out AI-generated music despite competitors like Deezer offering such functionality. The absence raises questions about Spotify's stance on AI music and user control over listening experience.
content: Music streamer Deezer allows users to filter out AI music, so why does Spotify not offer the same?

zh.title: 为什么Spotify没有过滤AI音乐的按钮
zh.summary: 尽管Deezer等竞争对手提供了此功能，Spotify仍缺乏过滤AI生成音乐的功能。这一缺失引发了人们对Spotify在AI音乐方面立场以及用户对听觉体验控制权的疑问。

title: Saba Capital finds little appetite for tender offer of shares in Blue Owl, Starwood private credit funds
summary: Saba Capital's tender offer for Blue Owl and Starwood private credit fund shares has attracted minimal investor interest despite discounted pricing. The weak response reflects broader redemption pressures and investor caution in the non-traded BDC market.
content: Investors' disinterest in getting liquidity at a steep discount comes amid a quarter that saw elevated redemptions across most private-credit, non-traded BDCs.

zh.title: Saba Capital发现对Blue Owl和Starwood私募信贷基金股份的要约收购兴趣寥寥
zh.summary: 尽管定价有折扣，Saba Capital对Blue Owl和Starwood私募信贷基金股份的要约收购吸引了极少投资者的兴趣。这种疲弱的反应反映了非交易BDC市场中更广泛的赎回压力和投资者的谨慎态度。

title: Domino's Pizza stock falls on disappointing sales — and CEO thinks more chains will follow
summary: Domino's Pizza stock declined following disappointing quarterly sales, with CEO Russell Weiner attributing weakness to winter weather and diminished consumer spending. The executive expects other fast-food chains will report similar challenges in upcoming earnings.
content: CEO Russell Weiner said he expects more fast-food chains will report that winter weather and weak consumer sentiment hurt their quarterly sales.

zh.title: 达美乐披萨股价因销售失利下跌——首席执行官认为其他连锁店也将效仿
zh.summary: 达美乐披萨股价因季度销售失利而下跌，首席执行官罗素·韦纳将疲软归因于冬季恶劣天气和消费者支出减少。这位高管预期其他快餐连锁店在即将公布的财报中将面临类似挑战。

title: Cramer calls blistering rally in chip stocks 'worrisome.' How he's protecting his portfolio
summary: Jim Cramer expressed concern that the sharp rally in semiconductor and AI-related stocks may signal broader market risks. The CNBC analyst outlined portfolio adjustments in response to what he views as potentially excessive valuations.
content: CNBC's Jim Cramer explained that the recent run-up in AI related stocks may be a warning sign about the broader market.

zh.title: 克莱默称芯片股票迅速上涨令人"担忧" 他如何保护自己的投资组合
zh.summary: 吉姆·克莱默表示担忧芯片和人工智能相关股票的急剧上升可能预示更广泛的市场风险。这位CNBC分析师阐述了应对他认为可能过高估值的投资组合调整措施。

title: ‘We believe it’s real’: My mom received a check from a class-action lawsuit. It bounced. Could this be a scam?
summary: A woman's mother received what appeared to be a legitimate class-action settlement check that subsequently bounced, resulting in unauthorized account deductions. The incident raises awareness about class-action fraud scams targeting unsuspecting recipients.
content: “Now they are deducting that amount from her account.”

zh.title: "我们认为这是真的"：我母亲收到了一张集体诉讼和解支票。它被退票了。这会是骗局吗？
zh.summary: 一名妇女的母亲收到了一张看似合法的集体诉讼和解支票，随后被退票，导致账户未经授权的扣款。该事件提高了人们对针对毫无防备的接收者的集体诉讼欺诈骗局的认识。

title: Arm’s stock snaps a seven-day winning streak as it loses some of its AI glow
summary: Arm Holdings' stock ended its seven-day winning streak Monday amid a broader pullback in AI-related equities and uncertainty about its role in potential Qualcomm-OpenAI chip development. Concerns about competitive positioning weighed on the semiconductor company's shares.
content: Arm shares led Nadsaq 100 decliners on Monday, reflecting more general pressure on AI names and specific concerns about whether Arm will play a role in a potential Qualcomm-OpenAI chip.

zh.title: Arm股价终结七连涨，AI光芒褪去
zh.summary: Arm Holdings的股价在周一终结了七连涨的势头，此时AI相关股票出现更广泛的回调，且对其在潜在高通-OpenAI芯片开发中角色的不确定性增加。半导体公司的股价因竞争地位方面的担忧而承压。

title: ‘I hope to retire early’: I’m 56 and have 80% in a traditional IRA and 20% in a Roth. Am I in trouble?
summary: A 56-year-old with $3.5 million in savings heavily weighted toward traditional IRAs is evaluating early retirement plans and tax implications. Financial advisors address portfolio allocation strategy and potential penalties for early withdrawals.
content: “We have $3.5 million in savings — $2.5 million of which are in retirement accounts.”

zh.title: "我希望早日退休"：我今年56岁，80%存在传统IRA，20%在罗斯IRA中。我有麻烦吗？
zh.summary: 一位56岁的人拥有350万美元储蓄，其中大部分存在传统IRA中，正在评估提前退休计划和税务影响。理财顾问讨论了投资组合配置策略和提前提取资金的可能罚款。

title: Micron and Sandisk continue rally as demand for memory expected to persist
summary: Memory chip manufacturers Micron and Sandisk surged following analyst forecasts predicting strong demand through 2030. The rally reflects confidence in sustained growth for memory semiconductors driven by AI and data center expansion.
content: Shares of Micron and Sandisk jumped after Melius Research said in a report that demand for memory will remain strong through the end of the decade.

zh.title: 美光和闪迪继续上涨，内存需求预计持续旺盛
zh.summary: 内存芯片制造商美光和闪迪在分析师预测2030年前需求强劲后上涨。这一上涨反映了市场对由AI和数据中心扩展推动的内存半导体可持续增长的信心。

title: Cole Allen charged with trying to assassinate Trump at WHCD event
summary: A security incident at the White House Correspondents' Dinner resulted in President Trump's evacuation Saturday, prompting scrutiny of Secret Service protocols. The incident highlights ongoing challenges in securing high-profile public events. This breach raises questions about event security procedures and presidential protection measures.
content: The Secret Service is facing scrutiny over security at the White House Correspondents' Dinner, where President Donald Trump was evacuated Saturday.

zh.title: 科尔·艾伦因在白宫记者晚宴试图暗杀特朗普被控
zh.summary: 白宫记者晚宴发生的安全事件导致特朗普总统周六被疏散，引发对特勤局协议的审查。该事件突显了保护高知名度公众活动的持续挑战。这一安全漏洞引发了对活动安全程序和总统保护措施的质疑。

title: What the 'Magnificent Seven' charts are showing ahead of earnings, according to Katie Stockton
summary: The "Magnificent Seven" tech companies (Alphabet, Amazon, Meta, Microsoft, Apple) collectively representing 24% of the S&P 500 report earnings this week. Their results will significantly influence broader market sentiment and direction. Strong performance from these megacaps is crucial for overall market momentum.
content: Alphabet, Amazon, Meta, Microsoft and Apple all report this weak. Combined, they make up 24% of the S&P 500.

zh.title: 根据凯蒂·斯托克顿的分析，"七巨头"图表在财报发布前显示了什么
zh.summary: 代表标普500指数24%的"七巨头"科技公司（Alphabet、亚马逊、Meta、微软、苹果）本周公布财报。它们的业绩将显著影响更广泛的市场情绪和方向。这些巨型科技公司的强劲表现对整体市场动能至关重要。

title: New Wall Street research touts our long-held view on AI and cybersecurity stocks
summary: CrowdStrike has received renewed Wall Street analyst support as AI-driven cyber threats increase demand for advanced security platforms. The report reflects growing recognition of cybersecurity as a critical investment theme tied to AI adoption. This underscores the market's view of security companies as essential infrastructure beneficiaries.
content: CrowdStrike won fresh Wall Street support as analyst said rising AI-driven cyber threats increase demand for the company's security platform.

zh.title: 新的华尔街研究报告支持我们长期以来对AI和网络安全股票的看法
zh.summary: 随着人工智能驱动的网络威胁增加了对高级安全平台的需求，CrowdStrike获得了华尔街分析师的新一轮支持。该报告反映了市场对网络安全作为与人工智能采用相关的关键投资主题的日益认识。这强调了市场对安全公司作为基础设施受益者的看法。

title: Trump discussed Iran's Hormuz Strait proposal with top aides, White House says
summary: The Trump administration discussed Iran's Hormuz Strait proposal with senior aides, with officials reiterating that preventing Iranian nuclear weapons remains central to U.S. strategy. The discussions underscore ongoing U.S.-Iran tensions and Middle East policy priorities. These talks indicate continued diplomatic engagement on critical regional security issues.
content: The Trump administration has repeatedly insisted that the central goal of the conflict is keeping Iran from ever obtaining a nuclear weapon.

zh.title: 白宫称特朗普与高级助手讨论了伊朗霍尔木兹海峡提议
zh.summary: 特朗普政府与高级助手讨论了伊朗的霍尔木兹海峡提议，官员们重申防止伊朗核武器仍是美国战略的核心。这些讨论突显了持续的美伊紧张局势和中东政策优先事项。这些谈话表明在重要地区安全问题上继续进行外交接触。

title: The SEC fears we’re trapped in short-term thinking. Tesla and Amazon prove investors play the long game.
summary: The SEC expresses concern that semiannual earnings reporting encourages short-term investor thinking, though market successes like Tesla and Amazon suggest investors take longer views. The debate reflects tension between regulatory preferences and actual investor behavior. The discussion raises questions about whether earnings frequency truly shapes long-term investment strategies.
content: Semiannual earnings reporting tries to “fix” a problem that the market’s success stories have already solved.

zh.title: 美国证券交易委员会担忧陷入短期思维。特斯拉和亚马逊证明投资者眼光长远。
zh.summary: 美国证券交易委员会表示担忧，半年度收益报告可能鼓励短期投资者思维，尽管特斯拉和亚马逊等市场成功案例表明投资者具有更长期的视角。这场辩论反映了监管偏好与实际投资者行为之间的紧张关系。讨论提出了关于收益报告频率是否真正影响长期投资策略的问题。

title: Why individual investors are cautious ahead of earnings for Microsoft, Amazon and the rest of the ‘Magnificent Seven’
summary: Retail investors are trading major tech stocks with less fervor than usual as the "Magnificent Seven" approach earnings season. The subdued trading activity indicates increased caution among individual investors ahead of key earnings reports. This suggests uncertainty about tech valuations or near-term growth prospects.
content: Retail investors aren’t trading the megacap tech stocks with their usual fervor.

zh.title: 为什么个人投资者在微软、亚马逊和其他"七巨头"财报前保持谨慎
zh.summary: 随着"七巨头"科技公司接近财报季，零售投资者对主要科技股的交易热情不如以往。交易活动的减弱表明个人投资者在主要财报发布前谨慎态度增强。这表明对科技估值或短期增长前景存在不确定性。

title: Private credit isn’t safer than banks — it’s just better at hiding losses
summary: Private credit funds may mask investment losses through accounting practices that make returns appear stronger than actual performance. Investors lack transparent visibility into whether fund returns reflect genuine investment skill or accounting techniques. This raises growing concerns about transparency in the rapidly expanding private credit market.
content: Investors have no idea that fund returns can reflect clever accounting instead of investment skill.

zh.title: 私募信贷并不比银行更安全——只是更善于隐藏损失
zh.summary: 私募信贷基金可能通过会计做法掩盖投资损失,使回报看起来比实际表现更强。投资者缺乏透明可见性,无法判断基金回报是否反映了真实的投资技能或会计技巧。这引发了人们对迅速扩张的私募信贷市场透明度的日益关切。

title: Former Google DeepMind researcher's AI startup raises record $1.1 billion seed funding to pursue superintelligence
summary: Ineffable Intelligence, founded by a former Google DeepMind researcher, secured a record $1.1 billion seed funding round at a $5.1 billion valuation to pursue superintelligence research. The unprecedented seed funding reflects intense investor appetite for ambitious AI ventures. This capital level demonstrates significant confidence in the company's technical approach and market potential.
content: Ineffable Intelligence has emerged from stealth with a $5.1 billion valuation.

zh.title: 前谷歌DeepMind研究员的AI初创公司以创纪录的11亿美元种子融资追求超级智能
zh.summary: 由前谷歌DeepMind研究员创办的Ineffable Intelligence公司以51亿美元估值获得创纪录的11亿美元种子融资,用于追求超级智能研究。这笔前所未有的种子融资反映了投资者对雄心勃勃AI企业的强烈需求。这个资本水平表明投资者对该公司的技术方法和市场潜力具有重大信心。

title: Jury selection kicks off in Musk v. Altman trial
summary: Jury selection began in the Musk v. Altman trial at federal court in Oakland, California, with opening arguments to follow. The high-profile case involves disputes between major AI figures regarding OpenAI's direction and governance. The trial is closely watched for its implications on AI industry leadership and corporate structure.
content: The Musk v. Altman trial kicked off at a federal courthouse in Oakland, California, with jury selection followed by opening arguments.

zh.title: 马斯克诉奥特曼案陪审团选择开始
zh.summary: 马斯克诉奥特曼案在加州奥克兰联邦法院开始选择陪审团,随后将进行开场陈词。这起备受关注的案件涉及主要AI人物关于OpenAI方向和治理的纠纷。该诉讼因其对AI行业领导力和公司结构的影响而备受关注。

title: Another former bull throws in the towel on Adobe’s stock. Here’s the software stock he now favors.
summary: Mizuho analyst Gregg Moskowitz downgraded Adobe to neutral from outperform while upgrading CrowdStrike to outperform from neutral. The shift reflects changing sentiment about software company valuations and competitive positioning. This reversal highlights increased investor confidence in cybersecurity stocks relative to broader software companies.
content: Mizuho analyst Gregg Moskowitz downgrade shares of Adobe to neutral from outperform and upgraded shares of CrowdStrike to outperform from neutral on Monday.

zh.title: 又一位曾经的看好者放弃了Adobe股票。这是他现在看好的软件股票。
zh.summary: 瑞穗分析师格雷格·莫斯科维茨将Adobe从跑赢评级降级至中性，同时将CrowdStrike从中性升级至跑赢。这一转变反映了人们对软件公司估值和竞争地位看法的改变。这个逆转凸显了投资者对网络安全股票相对于更广泛软件公司的信心增加。

title: Pharma bets a little-known form of cholesterol will underpin its next blockbuster heart drugs
summary: Novartis, Amgen, and Eli Lilly are developing drugs targeting a specific form of cholesterol as the foundation for next-generation heart disease treatments. This therapeutic approach represents a significant shift in cardiology drug development. Success could produce major blockbuster medications addressing widespread cardiovascular disease.
content: Novartis, Amgen and Eli Lilly are betting that slashing levels of a particularly bad form of cholesterol could deliver the next blockbusters in cardiology.

zh.title: 制药公司押注一种鲜为人知的胆固醇形式将成为其下一个突破性心脏药物的基础
zh.summary: 诺华、安进和礼来正在开发针对特定胆固醇形式的药物，作为下一代心脏病治疗的基础。这种治疗方法代表了心脏病学药物开发的重大转变。成功可能会产生解决广泛心血管疾病的重磅药物。

title: Trump ballroom lawsuit plaintiff rejects DOJ demand to drop case after 'assassination attempt'
summary: The plaintiff in a Trump ballroom lawsuit rejected a DOJ demand to drop the case following Saturday's assassination attempt at the White House Correspondents' Dinner. Trump and supporters argue a ballroom venue would offer superior security compared to the Washington Hilton where the shooting occurred. The lawsuit continues despite the security incident at the alternative venue.
content: Trump and others say the proposed White House ballroom would be much more secure than the Washington Hilton Hotel, where Saturday's shooting occurred.

zh.title: 特朗普宴会厅诉讼原告在"暗杀企图"后拒绝司法部要求撤案
zh.summary: 特朗普宴会厅诉讼的原告拒绝了司法部在周六白宫记者晚餐暗杀企图后撤案的要求。特朗普和支持者辩称，相比发生枪击事件的华盛顿希尔顿酒店，宴会厅场地会提供更优越的安全保障。尽管在替代场地发生了安全事件，诉讼仍在继续。

title: Ray Dalio says Kevin Warsh shouldn't cut interest rates in a ‘stagflation’ era
summary: Billionaire Ray Dalio warned that interest rate cuts by Kevin Warsh during stagflation could damage Federal Reserve credibility at a critical moment. The warning reflects concerns about maintaining central bank confidence while navigating complex economic conditions. It highlights ongoing debate about appropriate monetary policy in the current environment.
content: Dalio said that if Kevin Warsh were to cut rates, it would risk damaging confidence in the central bank at a critical moment.

zh.title: 雷·达利欧表示凯文·沃什不应在"滞胀"时代降低利率
zh.summary: 亿万富翁雷·达利欧警告称，凯文·沃什在滞胀期间降低利率可能会在关键时刻损害美联储的信誉。这一警告反映了人们对在复杂经济条件下维持央行信心的担忧。它突显了关于当前环境中适当货币政策的持续辩论。

title: A possible SiriusXM-iHeartMedia merger would be the latest ominous sign for radio
summary: A potential SiriusXM-iHeartMedia merger would create a major advertising powerhouse but signals continued radio industry consolidation amid structural headwinds. The merger reflects both companies' efforts to compete against streaming platforms and podcasts attracting listeners. Consolidation suggests traditional radio faces ongoing challenges retaining audiences and advertisers.
content: The potential tie-up would create an advertising behemoth that could help the companies forestall declines as listeners increasingly shift to streaming platforms and podcasts.

zh.title: SiriusXM和iHeartMedia可能的合并将成为广播业的最新不祥之兆
zh.summary: 潜在的SiriusXM-iHeartMedia合并将创造一个主要的广告强势企业，但表明在结构性逆风中广播业继续整合。该合并反映了两家公司为与吸引听众的流媒体平台和播客竞争所做的努力。整合表明传统广播面临保留听众和广告商的持续挑战。

title: Nvidia, Intel call buyers defy the dip in chip stocks
summary: Investors aggressively bought Nvidia call options, including a $2.2 million purchase of May contracts, signaling bullish sentiment in chip stocks despite recent weakness. The options activity suggests traders expect further upside in semiconductors. This contrarian positioning reflects confidence in the sector's recovery potential.
content: One of the biggest trades in the group this morning is a $2.2 million purchase of 2,168 $210-strike calls in Nvidia that expire May 15.

zh.title: 英伟达、英特尔看涨期权买家逆势而上，不畏芯片股下跌
zh.summary: 投资者积极买入英伟达看涨期权，包括购买220万美元的5月合约，尽管最近走势疲软，但信号显示对芯片股看好。期权活动表明交易员预期半导体进一步上升。这种逆向定位反映了对该行业复苏潜力的信心。

title: Eli Lilly to buy Ajax Therapeutics for up to $2.3 billion in blood cancer bet
summary: Eli Lilly's acquisition of Ajax Therapeutics for up to $2.3 billion represents a significant investment in blood cancer treatments, expanding the pharmaceutical giant's oncology portfolio. The deal demonstrates ongoing consolidation in the biotech sector as major companies pursue specialized drug development capabilities.
content: Eli Lilly said on Monday ​it would buy ​privately ​held blood cancer treatment developer Ajax Therapeutics for up to $2.3 billion in ⁠cash.

zh.title: 礼来斥资23亿美元收购Ajax Therapeutics进军血液癌症领域
zh.summary: 礼来制药公司以高达23亿美元的价格收购Ajax Therapeutics，这代表了在血液癌症治疗领域的重大投资，扩展了这家医药巨头的肿瘤学产品组合。该交易反映了生物科技行业的持续整合，大型公司纷纷寻求获得专业化的药物开发能力。

title: Oil giant Shell agrees to buy Canada’s ARC Resources for $16.4 billion
summary: Shell's $16.4 billion acquisition of Canada's ARC Resources will add approximately 370,000 barrels of oil equivalent per day to the energy giant's production portfolio. The transaction positions Shell to increase long-term crude output and strengthen its competitive position in global energy markets.
content: The transaction will add roughly 370,000 barrels of oil equivalent per day to Shell's portfolio and is designed to boost the firm's long-term production.

zh.title: 石油巨头壳牌同意以164亿美元收购加拿大ARC Resources公司
zh.summary: 壳牌以164亿美元收购加拿大ARC Resources公司，将为这家能源巨头的产量组合增加约37万桶油当量/日。该交易将帮助壳牌提高长期原油产量，加强其在全球能源市场中的竞争地位。

title: Why Morgan Stanley sees little possibility of a stock-market retreat
summary: Morgan Stanley analysts contend that strong earnings momentum, capital expenditure growth, and AI adoption are creating structural support for stock valuations and limiting pullback opportunities despite geopolitical risks. The outlook suggests investors may have fewer opportunities to buy into market weakness in the near term.
content: Earnings, capex and AI adoption are  developing momentum and reducing opportunities for investors to buy into geopolitically-driven weakness

zh.title: 摩根士丹利认为股市回调可能性很小
zh.summary: 摩根士丹利分析师认为，强劲的盈利势头、资本支出增长和人工智能采用正为股票估值提供结构性支撑，尽管存在地缘政治风险，但限制了市场回调的机会。该前景表明，投资者在近期内可能很少有机会逢低买入。

title: MAHA at odds with Trump over Supreme Court's glyphosate case, farm bill
summary: The agriculture nonprofit MAHA's position on a Supreme Court glyphosate case and farm bill policy diverges from President Trump and Republican congressional leadership, highlighting internal disagreement on agricultural regulation and herbicide safety policy. The dispute reflects broader divisions within conservative constituencies on farming issues.
content: Supreme Court arguments Monday and the farm bill put MAHA squarely at odds with President Donald Trump and the majority of Republicans in Congress.

zh.title: 马哈与特朗普在最高法院草甘膦案和农业法案上存在分歧
zh.summary: 农业非营利组织MAHA在最高法院草甘膦案和农业法案政策上的立场与特朗普总统和共和党国会领导层不同，突出了农业监管和除草剂安全政策上的内部分歧。这一分歧反映了保守派选民在农业问题上更广泛的分裂。

title: Here are Monday's biggest analyst calls: Nvidia, Apple, Tesla, Micron, AMD, DoorDash, CrowdStrike & more
summary: Wall Street analysts issued major calls Monday on prominent technology and consumer stocks including Nvidia, Apple, Tesla, Micron, AMD, DoorDash, and CrowdStrike. The recommendations represent significant market-moving analyst guidance across semiconductor, consumer tech, and software sectors.
content: Here are Monday's biggest calls on Wall Street.

zh.title: 以下是周一最大的分析师评级：英伟达、苹果、特斯拉、美光、AMD、DoorDash、CrowdStrike等
zh.summary: 华尔街分析师周一对英伟达、苹果、特斯拉、美光、AMD、DoorDash和CrowdStrike等主要科技和消费股发布了重要评级。这些建议代表了半导体、消费科技和软件领域具有重要市场影响力的分析师指导。

title: United CEO defends merger dreams despite pushback from American Airlines
summary: United Airlines CEO Scott Kirby defended his strategic pursuit of merger discussions with American Airlines despite the carrier's rejection of the proposal. Kirby stated that the talks have ended for now, acknowledging the challenge of executing transformative deals without willing participants.
content: United CEO Scott Kirby said the pursuit of talks with American has ended for now, as he defended his reasoning for pursuing talks.

zh.title: 美联航首席执行官为并购梦想辩护，尽管面临美国航空公司的反对
zh.summary: 美联航首席执行官斯科特·基尔比为与美国航空公司的并购讨论的战略追求进行了辩护，尽管该航空公司拒绝了该提议。基尔比表示谈判目前已暂停，承认在没有愿意参与者情况下执行变革性交易的挑战。

title: This bank CEO let his AI clone handle an earnings call — now he's signing an OpenAI deal
summary: Customers Bank CEO Sam Sidhu employed an AI-powered clone to conduct an earnings call, then signed a partnership deal with OpenAI as the financial services industry races to deploy AI agents. The move signals aggressive adoption of artificial intelligence to reshape workforce operations and customer interactions.
content: It's part of Customers Bank CEO Sam Sidhu's effort to get ahead in the industry's race to transform itself using AI agents as a new digital workforce

zh.title: 这位银行CEO让他的AI分身主持财报会议——现在他正在签署OpenAI协议
zh.summary: 客户银行首席执行官Sam Sidhu聘请一个AI驱动的克隆人进行财报电话会议，随后与OpenAI签署了合作伙伴协议，因为金融服务业竞相部署AI代理。这举动表明人工智能在改造工作流程和客户互动方面的积极采用。

title: They have millions in the bank — but without kids, who makes their life-or-death decisions?
summary: Wealthy individuals without children are increasingly hiring professional fiduciaries and next-of-kin services to handle critical life-and-death medical and financial decisions. This emerging market addresses a gap in estate planning for the growing demographic of solo agers with substantial assets but no family heirs.
content: Wall Street caters to generational wealth, but a rising class of child-free “solo agers” is hiring professional next-of-kin.

zh.title: 他们的银行账户里有数百万——但没有孩子，谁来做他们的生死决定？
zh.summary: 没有孩子的富有人士越来越多地聘请专业的受信人和法定继承人服务来处理关键的生死医疗和财务决定。这个新兴市场为资产丰厚但没有家庭继承人的单身衰老人口的遗产规划填补了空白。

title: Qualcomm jumps 12% on report it’s partnering with OpenAI on smartphone AI chip
summary: Qualcomm will partner with MediaTek and manufacturer Luxshare to develop a specialized smartphone AI chip for OpenAI. The collaboration represents a significant push by the chipmaker to capture OpenAI's hardware ecosystem and meet growing AI processing demands in mobile devices.
content: Qualcomm will be working alongside MediaTek to develop a smartphone chip for OpenAI, with manufacturer Luxshare co-designing the device, an analyst said.

zh.title: 高通股价上涨12%，因为报道称它正与OpenAI合作开发智能手机AI芯片
zh.summary: 高通将与联发科和制造商Luxshare合作，为OpenAI开发一款专门的智能手机AI芯片。这项合作代表了这家芯片制造商在获取OpenAI硬件生态系统并满足移动设备中不断增长的AI处理需求方面的重大举措。

title: China blocks Meta's $2 billion takeover of AI startup Manus
summary: China's regulatory authorities blocked Meta's proposed $2 billion acquisition of Manus, a Singapore-based AI startup with Chinese origins. The decision reflects ongoing tension between Beijing and major U.S. tech companies over AI development and data control.
content: China said Monday it has decided to block Meta's $2 billion acquisition of Manus, a Singaporean AI startup with Chinese roots.

zh.title: 中国阻止Meta对AI初创公司Manus的20亿美元收购
zh.summary: 中国监管机构阻止了Meta对新加坡AI初创公司Manus的20亿美元收购，该公司具有中国背景。这一决定反映了北京与美国主要科技公司在AI开发和数据控制方面的持续紧张关系。

title: United Airlines CEO confirms he approached American Airlines about merger
summary: United Airlines CEO Scott Kirby disclosed that he approached American Airlines about a potential merger, which American rejected. Without a willing partner, Kirby acknowledged that pursuing such a transformative transaction is infeasible.
content: United CEO Scott Kirby said American rejected the idea, "and without a willing partner, something this big simply can't get done."

zh.title: 美联航CEO确认曾接洽美国航空公司提议合并
zh.summary: 美联航CEO斯科特·柯比透露，他曾接洽美国航空公司讨论潜在合并，但遭到拒绝。由于没有愿意的合作伙伴，柯比承认追求这样具有变革性的交易是不可行的。

title: Pension-fund rebalancing and other red flags that suggest a stock-market pullback is nearing, according to Goldman Sachs
summary: Goldman Sachs' trading desk has identified warning signs of an impending stock market pullback, including pension fund rebalancing and uneven rally dynamics following the S&P 500's ninth record close. The analysis suggests technical and structural headwinds could trigger a correction despite positive momentum.
content: An uneven rally is just one reason why the Goldman Sachs trading desk is bracing for a pullback after the S&P 500’s ninth record close last week.

zh.title: 根据高盛，养老基金再平衡和其他迹象表明股市回调即将来临
zh.summary: 高盛交易部门发现了股市即将回调的警告信号，包括养老基金再平衡和标普500指数第九次创纪录高位之后的不均衡上升动态。分析表明，尽管势头向好，但技术性和结构性逆风可能会引发调整。

title: Brent oil prices briefly top $108 per barrel after Iran peace talks unravel
summary: Oil prices briefly exceeded $108 per barrel following the breakdown of Iran peace negotiations after President Trump cancelled plans to send U.S. envoys to Pakistan for talks. The geopolitical development added fresh supply concerns to crude markets amid broader Middle East tensions.
content: President Donald Trump on Saturday cancelled plans to send U.S. envoy Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner to Islamabad, Pakistan for negotiations with Iran.

zh.title: 伊朗和平谈判破裂后布伦特油价一度突破每桶108美元
zh.summary: 美国总统特朗普取消派遣特使前往巴基斯坦进行谈判后，伊朗和平谈判破裂导致油价一度突破每桶108美元。这一地缘政治事件为原油市场增添了新的供应担忧，加剧了中东地区的紧张局势。

title: Meta’s $2 billion acquisition gets blocked by China. What the deal was all about in the first place.
summary: Meta's $2 billion acquisition of Manus, an autonomous AI products startup, was blocked by Chinese regulators. The deal represented Meta's strategy to expand its artificial intelligence capabilities, but regulatory barriers prevented the transaction from closing.
content: Meta Platforms on Monday suffered a setback as a deal to acquire a company focused on autonomous artificial intelligence products was blocked.

zh.title: Meta的20亿美元收购交易被中国叫停，这笔交易最初是怎么回事
zh.summary: Meta对自主AI产品初创公司Manus的20亿美元收购被中国监管部门叫停。该交易代表了Meta扩展人工智能能力的战略，但监管障碍阻止了交易的完成。

title: The bullish signals ahead of this week's Mag-7 earnings
summary: Trading in Magnificent Seven technology stocks reveals bullish sentiment ahead of earnings season, with call options trading at higher premiums than puts across five key names reporting this week. Call volume exceeds put volume in nearly all mega-cap tech stocks, signaling investor confidence despite market volatility.
content: Calls are trading more expensive than puts in the five names that report this week, and call volume outpaces put volume in all but Alphabet.

zh.title: 本周科技七巨头财报前的看涨信号
zh.summary: 科技股"七巨头"的交易显示在财报季前存在看涨情绪，在本周报告的五个关键公司中，看涨期权交易价格高于看跌期权。几乎所有巨型科技股的看涨期权成交量都超过看跌期权成交量，尽管市场波动较大，但表明投资者信心十足。

title: We spoke to over 30 CEOs and business leaders. Here's what worries them most
summary: Business leaders globally face a new baseline reality of war, inflation, and artificial intelligence as persistent challenges. This reflects shifting market conditions and corporate strategy priorities.
content: Business leaders across the world are confronting a new operating reality: one where war, inflation and artificial intelligence are part of the baseline.

zh.title: 我们与30多位首席执行官和商业领袖交谈。以下是令他们最担忧的事情
zh.summary: 全球商业领袖面临着战争、通胀和人工智能作为持久挑战的新基准现实。这反映了不断变化的市场条件和公司战略优先事项。

title: Sun Pharma shares jump 7% as India's largest drugmaker to buy U.S. firm Organon in $11.75 billion deal
summary: Sun Pharmaceutical Industries will acquire U.S.-based Organon & Co for $11.75 billion in an all-cash transaction, significantly expanding its global pharmaceutical footprint. The deal marks major consolidation in the pharmaceutical industry.
content: To fuel its global ambitions, Sun Pharmaceutical Industries will acquire New Jersey-based Organon & Co in an all-cash deal that values the U.S. company at $11.75 billion.

zh.title: Sun Pharma股价上涨7%，因为印度最大的制药公司将以117.5亿美元的价格收购美国企业Organon
zh.summary: 太阳制药工业公司将以117.5亿美元现金交易收购美国的Organon & Co公司，大幅扩展其全球制药业务。该交易标志着制药行业的重大整合。

title: Less bread and WFH Fridays – what Pret boss knows about our habits
summary: Pret's leadership emphasizes that customers value quality and service over simply purchasing the cheapest products. This insight reflects evolving consumer preferences in the food and beverage sector beyond price alone.
content: Customers want great value but that doesn't necessarily mean the cheapest products, says Pano Christou.

zh.title: 更少的面包和居家办公周五——Pret老板对我们习惯的了解
zh.summary: Pret领导层强调，顾客重视质量和服务，而不仅仅是购买最便宜的产品。这一洞察反映了食品和饮料行业消费者偏好的演变，超越了单纯的价格因素。

title: European markets to start the week higher as Iran reportedly makes peace proposal
summary: European stock markets are expected to open higher this week as investors react to reported peace overtures from Iran amid stalled U.S.-Iran negotiations. The potential diplomatic development could ease geopolitical tensions affecting global markets.
content: European stocks are expected to start the new week on a broadly positive footing as investors keep a close eye on stalled Iran-U.S. peace talks.

zh.title: 欧洲股市本周开盘上涨，伊朗据报提出和平建议
zh.summary: 随着投资者对伊朗在美伊谈判陷入僵局中提出的和平提议做出反应，欧洲股市预计本周开盘上涨。这一潜在的外交发展可能缓解影响全球市场的地缘政治紧张局势。

title: Iran reportedly proposes Hormuz Strait deal to U.S. Here’s where things stand — and what’s next for markets
summary: Iran has reportedly proposed a deal related to the Hormuz Strait to the U.S. as stalled negotiations continue. The proposal and its potential resolution could significantly impact global energy markets and geopolitical stability.
content: U.S.-Iran peace talks stall. Here's where things stand — and what's next for markets

zh.title: 伊朗据报向美国提出霍尔木兹海峡协议 目前局势如何及市场前景
zh.summary: 随着谈判继续陷入僵局，伊朗据报向美国提出了与霍尔木兹海峡相关的协议。这项提议及其潜在解决方案可能对全球能源市场和地缘政治稳定产生重大影响。

title: Oil prices rise as US-Iran peace talks stall
summary: U.S. oil prices increased as diplomatic negotiations between the U.S. and Iran stalled, with the Trump administration canceling a planned negotiation team visit to Pakistan. The breakdown in talks heightens uncertainty over energy markets and Middle East geopolitics.
content: President Trump said on Saturday that the US had cancelled plans to send a team to Pakistan for negotiations.

zh.title: 美伊和平谈判陷入僵局，油价上涨
zh.summary: 随着美伊之间的外交谈判陷入僵局，美国油价上涨，特朗普政府取消了计划中的谈判团队对巴基斯坦的访问。谈判破裂加剧了能源市场和中东地缘政治的不确定性。

title: 'I don't want the children to see how worried we are': UK family finances hit by Iran war
summary: British families are experiencing financial strain from the ongoing Iran conflict, with households cutting budgets and hiding economic anxiety from their children. The geopolitical crisis is having tangible impacts on everyday household finances across the UK.
content: British families tell BBC Panorama how the Iran war is affecting their monthly budgets.

zh.title: "我不希望孩子们看到我们有多担心"：英国家庭财务受伊朗战争冲击
zh.summary: 英国家庭因伊朗持续冲突而承受财务压力，家庭削减预算并向子女隐瞒经济担忧。这场地缘政治危机对英国各地日常家庭财务产生了实际影响。

title: China industrial profits jump 15.8% in March, fueled by AI and chip boom despite oil shock risks
summary: China's industrial profits surged 15.8% in March driven by artificial intelligence and semiconductor sector growth, though rising global oil prices pose emerging risks to manufacturing margins. The data reflects China's economic resilience amid technological advancement.
content: Rising global oil prices have begun seeping into the domestic economy, squeezing margins for manufacturers dependent on imported raw materials.

zh.title: 中国3月工业利润跃升15.8%，由人工智能和芯片繁荣推动，但面临油价冲击风险
zh.summary: 中国3月工业利润飙升15.8%，由人工智能和半导体行业增长推动，但全球油价上升对制造业利润率构成新兴风险。该数据反映了中国在技术进步中的经济韧性。

title: Japan, South Korea stocks hit record high as investors shrug off stalled U.S.-Iran negotiations
summary: Asian stocks reached new highs Monday despite U.S.-Iran diplomatic tensions, with investors shrugging off geopolitical headwinds. The strong performance in Japan and South Korea signals continued market confidence despite international setbacks.
content: Asia-Pacific markets climbed Monday as investors looked past renewed diplomatic setbacks between the U.S. and Iran.

zh.title: 日本、韩国股市创历史新高，投资者对停滞的美伊谈判不以为然
zh.summary: 尽管美伊外交紧张局势，亚洲股市周一创历史新高，投资者对地缘政治逆风不以为然。日本和韩国股市的强劲表现表明，尽管国际挫折，市场信心依然持续存在。
